title: Introduction to React Testing Library Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of React Testing Library.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of React Testing Library?
options: To test React components by focusing on user interactions rather than implementation details

questions.question: Regarding React Testing Library, why is it beneficial to test components from a user's perspective?
options: It makes tests easier to maintain and provides more confidence in their correctness
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
